case_title: PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS VS. ANDY VASILOUDIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2451 15TH STREET, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS SERVED FEB-10-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS NO SASE. ORDER TO POST IN OUTBOX IN DEPT. 501
DECLARATION OF LOST ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT VASILOUDIS, ANDY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.22. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
